title: OpenRiC autocomplete response
description: Response shape for GET /api/ric/v1/autocomplete?q=&types=&limit=. A flat array of entity hits across all requested types.

id.description: Stable identifier for the entity — either a numeric id or a canonical URI. Caller passes this back as ?uri= to /graph or to entity-specific endpoints.

label.description: Human-readable display label in the requested culture.

type.description: Short entity class — Place, Rule, Activity, Instantiation, Agent, Record, Repository, DigitalObject, Thing.
